heading: Procedure
body:
- The closest available region to allow Atlas to
  automatically choose the Data Federation region closest to you.

- A specific region to specify the region through
  which your federated database instance requests must be routed.

The federated database hostname in your current federated database instance connection
string will continue to work. However, to use the region you
selected, you must update the federated database hostname in your
federated database instance connection string. To utilize the new region, click the
Connect button for your federated database instance and follow the steps in
[connection string](fdi-connect).
